steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The first sentence states a general principle: sleek vehicles are more aerodynamic than bulkier ones. The second sentence presents the Airbus A350's streamlined nose as a concrete case. The blank must signal that the second sentence is an example illustrating the first.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Meanwhile': implies two things happening at the same time, not that one illustrates the other. ✗
  • Choice B — 'However': signals contrast or contradiction, the opposite of what's needed. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Additionally': adds a separate point rather than showing the A350 as a specific instance of the principle. ✗
  • Choice D — 'For example': introduces the A350's streamlined nose as a concrete instance of why sleek vehicles are more aerodynamic. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
